title: Twilit Scattering Twilight: team-member closeout — cure bundle v2 handed off via Director; session 8d8d93 complete; no retained claims
body:
Team-member closeout — Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.

Per owner direction at 13:13Z: "close all claims and prepare for handoff, this session is complete and all work must be passed to other agents via the director".

## Boundary owned this session (post-compaction window)

Owner-directed support to Incandescent on Monitor-harness liveness cure (FM-2). Full handoff received from Incandescent at 12:41Z (event 3af7c05a). Cure bundle absorbed, gated, reviewed (Secret synthesised GO-WITH-CONDITION), conditions absorbed, gates re-confirmed green, bundle-ready-v2 broadcast. Owner-directed Sonar delegation absorbed mid-session (4 fixes routed: 1 self-absorbed + 3 to Zephyrous/Pearly/Seaworthy with full transparency to Director).

## Outcome

- **Cure bundle v2 in working tree, gates all green**: 497/497 tests, type-check + lint + markdownlint + format all silent.
- **Bundle-ready-v2 broadcast**: event `e3e52ed5` (13:12Z) with full delta from v1 absorbing Secret's 3 conditions (Fix #1 JSON.parse → TypeError wrap with cause-chaining + new malformed-JSON test; Fix #2 schema_version pre-stable `0.1.0` constant; Fix #3 emit-error test refactored to call-count fake).
- **Sonar delegations complete**: Zephyrous + Pearly fixes queued at Seaworthy; Seaworthy's own item + type-expert dispatch returned DISPOSITION verdict (Gnarled fires the Sonar MCP ACCEPTED status changes per Director routing).
- **Director-handoff event** to Incandescent: `e4c31199` (13:14Z) carrying successor-pickup details.

## Evidence (key events authored)

- `ce973678` — team-start broadcast.
- `c5d2b0bf`, `d1f2b22f` — initial offers + refined picture to Incandescent (when they were still implementer).
- `439fc6ba` — ACK full handoff from Incandescent.
- `6cb880ca` — bundle-ready v1.
- `26d098fd` — lint re-green after formatter regression.
- `e3e52ed5` — bundle-ready v2 (Secret conditions absorbed).
- `e4c31199` — handoff to Director Incandescent.
- 4 Sonar-delegation events (`8d061580`, `ab60faca`, `dc83c615`, `d983f8b4`).

## Claims / queue / git state

- Claims under (Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93): NONE (96f00b19 closed at 13:13:46Z).
- Commit-queue intents under my agent: NONE (never enqueued — marshal cycle was pending bundle-ready-v2 ACK from reviewers; superseded by owner session-close direction).
- Working-tree state at close: cure files present in `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/*` + tests + 1 handoff-record auto-fix; nothing staged from Twilit. Successor opens fresh claim covering this surface, stages, marshal-cycles.

## Session complete announcement

Twilit Scattering Twilight session 8d8d93 closing. No retained claims. Comms watcher `bxllbjlcq` stopping immediately after this broadcast.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- `pnpm format:root` will re-expand inline returns that hit the function-body wrap threshold (`comms-relevant-events.ts:251`-over-250 regression at 13:07Z). Cure shape that survives prettier: single-expression body using `??` + nested ternary. Worth a napkin entry for the successor or future cure work.
- Zod `safeParse` is the canonical S7786 cure shape — replaces 60-line manual parse + multiple bare-Error throws with a declarative schema + single TypeError throw, satisfying max-lines + complexity + no-Record + no-as-cast + S7786 simultaneously. Worth noting as a doctrine pattern.
- Inter-agent peer-delegation under owner direction is workable in practice (Sonar fixes routed and back inside ~5 min per agent); the Practice constraint "coordinator routes" is owner-overridable when fitness is concrete.

## Blockers or risks

- **None for the cure substance** — gates green; reviewer verdicts absorbed.
- **Marshal cycle pending Torrid's adversarial verdict** — successor agent picks up via Director routing once Torrid's directed event lands.
- **Files-claim 96f00b19 is closed but the work isn't landed** — successor must open fresh claim before any further edits to the cure file list, otherwise concurrent-edit risk with other in-flight work.

## Handoff needed

YES — Director Incandescent owns re-routing the cure-marshal-landing pipeline to a successor agent per event `e4c31199`. Suggested commit subject for the eventual marshal cycle: `feat(agent-tools): land FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure (heartbeat substrate + step-runner + S7786 cure)`. 4 deferrable follow-up-tranche slices Secret named are NOT absorbed; future routing.

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.
